name: Chocolate Cherry Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in the melted baking chocolate, then add the egg and vanilla. Beat well to combine.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the chocolate mixture until just combined.
5. Roll out the pastry dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/8-inch thickness.
6. Cut circles using a 3-inch cookie cutter and place them in buttered tartlet pans or shallow muffin tins.
7. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, and egg until smooth.
8. Gently fold in the chopped maraschino cherries.
9. Fill each pastry case with about 1 tablespoon of the cherry filling.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
11. Remove from the oven and place a cherry half on top of each tart.
12. Chill before serving.
Yield: approximately 2 dozen tarts.
